name: Blender Sweet-Sour Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a blender container.
2. Blend until the pimiento slice and green pepper are finely chopped.
3. Pour mixture into a saucepan.
4. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly.
5. Continue cooking for 1 minute more.
6. Use as a basting sauce for meat during the last few minutes of broiling or roasting.
Makes 1 1/4 cups.
